## Problem

What user problem or workflow gap should this solve?

## Proposed Solution

What would you like SciScope to do?

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Affected Area

- Backend / API
- Data or RAG pipeline
- Go TUI
- Packaging or install
- Documentation or reports

## Additional Context

Links, screenshots, examples, or related issues.
